artifact_summary: Operational monitoring interface for Sump Pump No.1 (ID: H-010-DC400-114-01) displaying runtime metrics.
artifact_blurb: SCADA system faceplate visualization for Sump Pump No.1 (Asset ID: H-010-DC400-114-01), presenting real-time telemetry data including cumulative operational duration, active session runtime, and total start count.
